About Us

About Golden Inning

Golden Inning is an independent professional consultancy led by Devraj Gohil, offering expert advisory services across construction chemical manufacturing.

With over 34 years of manufacturing and industry leadership experience, the consultancy provides strategic, neutral, and independent guidance to promoters, investors and manufacturers.

The advisory focus spans plant setup, production stabilisation, product portfolio development and business strategy.

Enquire About Advisory Services
Why Golden Inning

Industry Experience Snapshot

34+
Years Industry Experience
Deep-rooted expertise across construction chemicals manufacturing
Expert
Construction Chemicals Manufacturing
Dry mix, tile adhesive, waterproofing, specialty chemicals advisory
End-to-End
Plant Setup & Production Stabilisation
From concept and layout to first commercial dispatch and quality systems
Proven
Manufacturing & Sales Leadership
Strategic advisory backed by hands-on industry leadership experience
What We Offer

Core Consultancy Services

Manufacturing Plant Setup

Advisory support for establishing construction chemical manufacturing units including dry mix plants and production layout planning.

Product Portfolio Development

Guidance in developing product range such as tile adhesives, waterproofing products, wall putty and other construction chemicals.

Production Stabilisation

Support for improving manufacturing performance including process optimisation, quality control systems and cost efficiency.

Business Growth Strategy

Strategic advisory for product positioning, market entry planning and distribution strategy for the construction chemicals sector.

Advisory Coverage

Industry Segments We Advise On

Independent advisory across three distinct construction chemical manufacturing categories.

Dry Mix Construction Chemicals

Advisory for manufacturers and investors establishing dry mix production.

  • Tile Adhesives
  • Tile Grouts
  • Skim Coat / Wall Putty
  • Repair Mortars
Waterproofing Systems

Consultancy for setting up waterproofing product manufacturing.

  • Cementitious Waterproofing
  • Acrylic Coatings
  • PU Coatings
  • Waterproofing Liquid
Specialty Construction Chemicals

Expert guidance on specialty product manufacturing.

  • Concrete Admixtures
  • Industrial Grouts
  • Industrial Flooring
  • Protective Coatings
